_comment: A CI flaky-test report fixture. A real one comes from a rerun plugin (pytest-rerunfailures, flaky-bot, or a CI dashboard's flake detector) that records which tests pass on retry. The loop's generator parses this into one Candidate per flaky test. `node_id` is the pytest node id and becomes the dedupe_key. `target_file` is the file the executor rewrites and the verifier re-runs.

flaky_tests.symptom: Intermittent AssertionError: observed == expected. Depends on the wall clock; flaps when the call straddles a 10-second bucket boundary.
Intermittent AssertionError: min(hand) <= 5. Depends on an unseeded RNG; flaps when all three drawn cards are high.
